ADJSUTED FOR ACTUAL LOCATION. HAIL SIZE WAS MEASURED AT 4.75 INCHES...LARGER THAN SOFTBALL SIZE HAIL. THIS WAS REPORTED AT CAMDEN DRIVE AND KETTLESON DRIVE IN MINOOKA. PHOTO VIA FACEBOOK. DAMAGE REPORTED CLOSE TO THIS LOCATION INCLUDED SHATTERED VEHICLE WINDSHIELD AND DAMAGE TO MULTIPLE OTHER VEHICLES. THIS WAS AT LEAST THE LARGEST HAIL REOCRDED IN THE STATE OF ILLINOIS SINCE 1961 AND POSSIBLY THE LARGEST OFFICIAL RECORD FOR THE STATE.
